title: pittosporum mannii subsp. ripicola
intro: Pittosporum mannii subsp. ripicola is a plant species known as a shrub or small tree, native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pittosporum mannii subsp. ripicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves or bark, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
